title: Deployment
description: Tracks deployed AI implementations, success metrics, adoption, issues, and realized ROI.

deploymentId.description: Unique identifier for this deployment record

companyProfileId.description: Reference to the company profile that owns this deployment

blueprintId.description: Identifier of the workflow blueprint that was deployed

opportunityId.description: Identifier of the opportunity record that this deployment fulfills

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this deployment

deployedAt.description: Timestamp when the deployment was first initiated

deployedBy.description: Entity that performed or led the deployment

component.description: Name or identifier of the deployed component

version.description: Version identifier of the deployed component

lastHealthCheck.description: Timestamp of the most recent health check performed on this component

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the component status and configuration

items.description: A single component deployed as part of this deployment

components.description: List of all components included in this deployment

userCount.description: Total number of users who have adopted the deployed solution

targetUserCount.description: Target number of users for full adoption

adoptionRate.description: Ratio of current users to target users, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1

departmentsUsing.description: List of departments actively using the deployed solution

weeklyActiveUsers.description: Number of distinct users active in the past week

powerUsers.description: Number of users with above-average engagement or usage frequency

trainingCompleted.description: Whether formal training has been completed for this deployment

trainingScore.description: Average training assessment score on a scale of 0 to 100

averageRating.description: Average user satisfaction rating on a scale of 1 to 5

recentComments.description: Recent user comments and qualitative feedback

npsScore.description: Net Promoter Score ranging from -100 to 100

feedback.description: Aggregated user feedback metrics for this deployment

evidence.description: Evidence supporting adoption metrics and user feedback

adoption.description: Adoption metrics tracking how users are engaging with the deployed solution

hoursPerWeek.description: Estimated hours saved per week as a result of this deployment

fullTimeEquivalents.description: Full-time employee equivalents freed up by the time savings

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the time savings calculation

timeSaved.description: Time savings realized from the deployment

amount.description: Monetary amount of cost reduction achieved

currency.description: ISO currency code for the reported cost reduction amount

period.description: Time period over which the cost reduction was measured

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the cost reduction claim

costReduced.description: Cost reductions attributed to this deployment

amount.description: Monetary amount of revenue impact attributed to this deployment

attribution.description: Explanation of how the revenue impact was attributed to this deployment

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the revenue impact claim

revenueImpact.description: Revenue impact generated by this deployment

metric.description: Name of the quality metric being measured

before.description: Value of the quality metric before deployment

after.description: Value of the quality metric after deployment

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the quality improvement claim

qualityImprovement.description: Quality improvements measured as a result of this deployment

roiCalculated.description: Timestamp when the overall ROI calculation was last performed

paybackPeriod.description: Estimated time period until the deployment investment is fully recovered

threeYearProjected.description: Projected total ROI over a three-year horizon

evidence.description: Aggregate evidence supporting the overall ROI assessment

roi.description: Return on investment metrics calculated for this deployment

rootCause.description: Identified root cause of the issue

resolution.description: Steps taken or planned to resolve the issue

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the issue was resolved

downtimeMinutes.description: Total downtime in minutes caused by this issue

items.description: A single issue logged against this deployment

issues.description: Issues and incidents encountered during or after deployment

name.description: Name of the key performance indicator

targetValue.description: Target or goal value for this KPI

currentValue.description: Current measured value for this KPI

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this KPI was last updated

trend.description: Directional trend of this KPI over recent measurements

items.description: A key performance indicator tracked for this deployment

kpis.description: Key performance indicators measuring deployment success

overall.description: Overall health status of the deployment

uptime.description: Uptime percentage over the measured period

lastIncident.description: Timestamp of the most recent incident affecting this deployment

incidentCount.description: Total number of incidents recorded for this deployment

checkedAt.description: Timestamp when this health check was performed

status.description: Health status reported by this check

detail.description: Additional details from this health check

items.description: A single health check record in the history

checkHistory.description: Historical health check results ordered by timestamp

health.description: Health monitoring data for the deployment

recommended.description: Recommended next action for this deployment

nextSteps.description: Concrete next steps to execute the recommended action

nextReviewDate.description: Scheduled date for the next review of this deployment

continuation.description: Continuation planning and recommendations for the deployment lifecycle

version.description: Schema or data version of this deployment record

createdBy.description: Entity or user that created this deployment record

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this deployment record was created

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this deployment record was last modified

sourceSystem.description: System or origin from which this deployment data was sourced

metadata.description: Metadata about the deployment record itself

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level indicating reliability of a piece of evidence

type.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

source.description: The origin or source of this evidence

detail.description: Detailed description of the evidence content

url.description: URL reference to the source of this evidence

confidence.description: Confidence level in this evidence item

evidenceItem.description: A single evidence item used across the Compass platform
